title: Failure to compile 0.57 on macOS
body:
### Version

0.57

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

Compile on macOS 13 x86_64 with `make install PREFIX=/usr/local/Cellar/yosys/0.57 PRETTY=0`.

### Expected Behavior

Should compile fine.

### Actual Behavior

Build fails with:

```
  /private/tmp/yosys-20250904-5092-su2ggt/abc/depends.sh "clang++" `dirname src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.c` -g -O -I/private/tmp/yosys-20250904-5092-su2ggt/abc/src -Wall -Wno-unused-function -Wno-write-strings -Wno-sign-compare -DABC_USE_STDINT_H  -DABC_NAMESPACE=abc -fpermissive -x c++ -DABC_USE_CUDD=1 -DABC_USE_READLINE  -DABC_USE_PTHREADS -Wno-unused-but-set-variable src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.c > src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.d
  In file included from frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y:129:
  ./frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.h:39:43: error: non-virtual member function marked 'override' hides virtual member function
                  int LexerInput(char* buf, int max_size) override {
                                                          ^
  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/include/FlexLexer.h:148:18: note: hidden overloaded virtual function 'frontend_verilog_yyFlexLexer::LexerInput' declared here: type mismatch at 2nd parameter ('size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') vs 'int')
    virtual size_t LexerInput( char* buf, size_t max_size );
                   ^
```

I think this was introduced by https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/pull/5135
code_blocks:
/private/tmp/yosys-20250904-5092-su2ggt/abc/depends.sh "clang++" `dirname src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.c` -g -O -I/private/tmp/yosys-20250904-5092-su2ggt/abc/src -Wall -Wno-unused-function -Wno-write-strings -Wno-sign-compare -DABC_USE_STDINT_H  -DABC_NAMESPACE=abc -fpermissive -x c++ -DABC_USE_CUDD=1 -DABC_USE_READLINE  -DABC_USE_PTHREADS -Wno-unused-but-set-variable src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.c > src/bdd/llb/llb4Image.d
  In file included from frontends/verilog/verilog_parser.y:129:
  ./frontends/verilog/verilog_lexer.h:39:43: error: non-virtual member function marked 'override' hides virtual member function
                  int LexerInput(char* buf, int max_size) override {
                                                          ^
  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/include/FlexLexer.h:148:18: note: hidden overloaded virtual function 'frontend_verilog_yyFlexLexer::LexerInput' declared here: type mismatch at 2nd parameter ('size_t' (aka 'unsigned long') vs 'int')
    virtual size_t LexerInput( char* buf, size_t max_size );
                   ^
